description: Paper key for object grouping.
Paper DOI when available in the extraction context.
notes: Useful but not identity-defining inside one paper.

description: Stage2 candidate-local formulation identifier.
notes: Maps to formulation_identity.source_stage2_row_id before later canonicalization.

description: Raw article-native formulation label.
notes: Preserve author wording exactly when possible.

description: Raw parent or inherited formulation reference.
Primary identity routing label such as new_formulation or variant_formulation.
notes: Keep compact enum; reconcile deterministically later if needed.

description: Role label such as baseline, variant, control, or characterization_only.
notes: Useful for later Stage5 identity closure.

description: Coarse confidence that the candidate is a distinct formulation identity.
notes: Formulation-level only; avoid per-field confidence sprawl.

description: Source mode such as llm_extracted or deterministic_table_addition.
notes: Deterministic additive rows may override this.

description: Short raw change descriptions that explain what differs from related formulations.
Compact semantic tags for context such as doe, sweep, or control.
Compact semantic tags for change interpretation.
notes: Used later for conservative relation and closure logic.

description: Owning formulation candidate.
notes: Links the component to one formulation candidate.

description: Stable within-payload component identifier.
Raw component wording.
Raw role such as polymer, drug, surfactant, solvent, lipid, or additive.
notes: Avoid fixed polymer or surfactant slots.

description: Raw phase assignment hint such as W1, O, W2, organic phase, or aqueous phase.
Raw author-side amount expression.
notes: Preserve direct mass, concentration, percentage, ratio, or volume forms.

description: Coarse hint such as mass, concentration, percent, volume, ratio, or unknown.
Raw numeric token surface if trivially available.
Raw unit token surface if trivially available.
Optional raw property list such as polymer MW text or LA:GA ratio text.
notes: Use for family-specific properties without universalizing them.

description: Owning formulation candidate.
notes: Links the phase to one formulation candidate.

description: Stable within-payload phase identifier.
Raw phase wording or code.
notes: Examples: W1, O, W2, organic phase.

description: Coarse normalized hint for the phase role.
Order hint when the sequence matters.
Owning formulation candidate.
notes: Links process facts to one formulation candidate.

description: Stable within-payload process-step identifier.
Raw preparation route or step wording.
Order hint when the paper clearly sequences steps.
notes: Deterministic ordering can refine this later.

description: Raw process parameter name.
notes: Examples: sonication time, stirring speed, evaporation time.

description: Raw parameter value expression.
notes: Keep raw expression instead of early conversion.

description: Owning formulation candidate.
notes: Links the factor to the formulation identity it helps define.

description: Stable within-payload factor identifier.
notes: May later map to process or component records.

description: Raw manipulated variable or factor wording.
Raw reported expression for the factor value.
Hint about what the factor modifies such as component, phase, process, or measurement condition.
Whether the paper treats this factor as formulation-identity defining.
Owning formulation candidate.
notes: Links the measurement to one candidate formulation.

description: Stable within-payload measurement identifier.
Raw measurement name.
notes: Examples: size, PDI, zeta potential, EE, loading content.

description: Raw measurement value text.
notes: Keep raw before canonical numeric parsing.

description: Raw measurement unit text.
Raw statistic qualifier such as mean, mean+sd, or single value.
Raw contextual qualifier such as release timepoint or medium.
notes: Keeps measurement context separate from identity.

description: Stable within-payload relation cue identifier.
Semantic link type such as inherits_from, varies_on, shared_with, or measured_for.
Local source object identifier or formulation candidate id.
notes: Can point to an object in the same payload.

description: Local target object identifier or formulation candidate id.
Short raw explanation for the semantic link.
Coarse confidence in the link.
Stable within-payload evidence handoff identifier.
Local object identifier receiving the evidence hint.
Field on the local object that the source hint refers to.
notes: Useful for later deterministic evidence assembly.

description: Coarse region type such as table_row, caption, methods_sentence, or results_sentence.
Short human-readable locator text.
notes: Examples: Table 2 row F3, methods paragraph on nanoprecipitation.

description: Short excerpt for deterministic routing only.
notes: Do not treat this as final evidence ownership.

description: Hint such as direct_support or contextual_support.
